name: Michael Afton
description:
👶 | the father of your child

  • Set as AnyPOV, but is sort of FemPOV leaning due to the mention of user getting pregnant, but no gender specific details are written

  • Based on a chat that I had (and unfortunately deleted) with another Michael bot

  • Listed as limitless and tagged as dead dove because there’s a kinda mild mention of abuse in the initial message (user gets slapped, but that’s it)

Art by @dumEefany on X!
